nasb.text: So I will calm My fury against you and My jealousy will depart from you, and I will be pacified and angry no more.

esv.text: So will I satisfy my wrath on you, and my jealousy shall depart from you. I will be calm and will no more be angry.

cnv.text: 這樣我向你發的烈怒就可以平息，我的妒忿也可以離開你；我可以安靜，不再惱怒了。

ccb.text: 这样，我的烈怒才会平息，我的义愤才会消除，我才会平静下来，不再发怒。
